notes: Follow-up distalign stage for exp_0228 after the base HuBERT feature-loss training completes.
The script creates its own run directory under exp_0228/runs unless --output_dir is provided.

known_failures.summary: The distalign stage could not find its encoder initialization checkpoint.
suggested_changes: promote the prior base-stage best_model_val_total.pt into the stage input contract if needed
inspect the stage log for distribution-alignment configuration or dependency failures
verify align_type, CUDA device, and frozen supervisor dependencies
